hero.subtitle: Claim up to €600 for a delayed or cancelled flight

step1.title: Where did you fly?
step1.airportPlaceholder: Enter the city or airport name
step1.yesDirect: Yes, it was a direct flight

step2.title: Type of disruption
step2.question: What was the nature of the flight disruption you encountered?

step3.title: How long were you delayed?
step3.question: How long were you delayed to reach your final destination?

step4.title: Reason for disruption
step4.question1: Did the airline tell you why the flight was disrupted?
step4.question2: What was the reason provided by the airline?

step5.title: Tell us more about your situation
step5.question: How long did you wait for a replacement flight or solution?
step5.describePlaceholder: E.g. My flight from London to Paris was delayed by 4 hours due to a technical issue with the aircraft...
step5.infoText: Sharing details about your experience can greatly improve your chances of a successful claim. The more specific you are, the higher your chances of approval.

form.freeCheck: Check your compensation — 100% free, no risk.

eligible.title: Great news — you may be eligible!
eligible.description: Based on your answers, you could be entitled to up to €600 in compensation under EU Regulation 261/2004. Start your free claim now!
eligible.descriptionDynamic: Based on your answers, you could be entitled to up to €{{amount}} in compensation under EU Regulation 261/2004. Start your free claim now!

notEligible.title: Unfortunately, you may not qualify
notEligible.description: Based on your answers, your delay appears to be under the 3-hour threshold required for EU compensation under Regulation 261/2004.

step8.title: Booking & consent
step8.bookingReferenceHelp: Found on your booking confirmation email
step8.consent: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and authorise Jet2Pay to act on my behalf. I understand the 30% No Win No Fee commission applies.
step8.gdpr: I consent to the processing of my personal data in accordance with the Privacy Policy and GDPR.

submitted.title: Claim submitted successfully!
submitted.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox.
submitted.trackClaim: Track your claim status anytime using your claim reference.

error.submissionFailed: Failed to submit claim. Please try again.
error.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

claimStatus.title: Check Claim Status
claimStatus.subtitle: Enter your claim reference number to track the progress of your compensation claim.
claimStatus.notFound: No claim found with this reference. Please check the ID and try again.
claimStatus.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

hero.title: Fighting for Your Flight Rights
hero.subtitle: We help passengers get the compensation they deserve when flights go wrong. No Win, No Fee — it's that simple.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text1: At Jet2Pay, we believe every passenger deserves fair treatment. When your flight is delayed, cancelled, or you're denied boarding, EU Regulation 261/2004 and UK261 protect your right to compensation of up to €600.
mission.text2: Our team of legal and aviation experts handles the entire claims process — from initial assessment to airline negotiation — so you don't have to. We only charge a 30% commission if we win your case.
mission.cardText: We've helped thousands of passengers across Europe claim their rightful compensation. Our automated system and expert team ensure fast, hassle-free processing.

transparency.title: Full Transparency
transparency.text: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. You only pay when we win your case — 30% commission on success.

noWinNoFee.title: No Win, No Fee
noWinNoFee.text: We take on all the risk. If your claim is unsuccessful, you pay absolutely nothing.

speed.title: Fast Processing
speed.text: Our automated eligibility engine gives you an instant assessment. Most claims are resolved within weeks.

expertise.title: Legal Expertise
expertise.text: Our team has deep knowledge of EC261/UK261 regulations and extensive experience dealing with airlines.

step1.title: Check Eligibility
step1.text: Enter your flight details and we'll instantly assess your claim.

step2.title: Submit Your Claim
step2.text: Fill in your details and upload your documents. It takes just 5 minutes.

step3.title: We Handle Everything
step3.text: Our team contacts the airline and handles all legal processes on your behalf.

step4.title: Get Compensated
step4.text: Once we win, your compensation is transferred directly to your bank account.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: A dedicated team of professionals committed to protecting your passenger rights.

cta.title: Ready to Claim Your Compensation?
cta.text: Check if your flight qualifies for up to €600 in compensation. It's free and takes just 2 minutes.

launch.title: Jet2Pay Launches: Helping Passengers Claim Flight Compensation
launch.summary: We're excited to announce the launch of Jet2Pay — a dedicated platform helping passengers claim compensation for delayed, cancelled, or overbooked flights under EU Regulation 261/2004 and UK261.

ec261Update.title: Understanding EC261: Your Complete Guide to Flight Compensation
ec261Update.summary: EU Regulation 261/2004 entitles passengers to compensation of €250–€600 for flight disruptions. Learn about your rights and how to claim.

knowYourRights.title: 5 Things Every Air Passenger Should Know About Their Rights
knowYourRights.summary: Many passengers don't know they're entitled to compensation. Here are the key facts about your rights when flights are delayed or cancelled.

delayTips.title: What to Do When Your Flight Is Delayed: A Step-by-Step Guide
delayTips.summary: Flight delayed? Don't panic. Follow our practical guide to protect your rights and maximize your compensation claim.

uk261.title: UK261: Post-Brexit Flight Compensation Rules Explained
uk261.summary: After Brexit, the UK adopted its own version of EC261 — known as UK261. Here's what it means for passengers flying to and from the UK.

partnerships.title: Jet2Pay Partners with Leading Aviation Data Providers
partnerships.summary: We've partnered with top flight data providers to offer real-time flight verification and faster claim processing for our customers.

cta.title: Had a flight disruption?
cta.text: Check if you're entitled to compensation — it's free and takes 2 minutes.

footer.description: Flight compensation made simple. We help passengers claim up to €600 for delayed, cancelled, or overbooked flights.

newsletter.title: Subscribe to our newsletter

hero.title: How It Works
hero.subtitle: Getting your flight compensation is easy. We handle everything — you just need to tell us what happened.

s1.title: Check Eligibility
s1.text: Enter your flight details into our free tool. Our system instantly checks EU Regulation 261/2004 and UK261 to determine if you're entitled to compensation of up to €600.

s2.title: Submit Your Claim
s2.text: Fill in your personal details, flight information, and upload any supporting documents. The entire process takes less than 5 minutes.

s3.title: We Handle Everything
s3.text: Our legal and aviation experts take over. We contact the airline, handle all correspondence and negotiations, and manage the legal process on your behalf.

s4.title: Get Compensated
s4.text: Once we successfully resolve your claim, the compensation is transferred directly to your bank account. We only deduct our 30% commission from the amount received.

noRisk.title: No Win, No Fee
noRisk.text: You pay nothing upfront. Our 30% commission is only charged when we successfully win your case.

fast.title: Expert Legal Team
fast.text: Our team specializes in EU air passenger rights and has extensive experience negotiating with airlines.

expertise.title: Fast & Easy
expertise.text: Submit your claim in under 5 minutes. We handle the rest and keep you updated at every step.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.text: Check if your flight qualifies for compensation — it's free and takes just 2 minutes.

hero.title: Pricing
hero.subtitle: No hidden fees, no upfront costs. You only pay when we win.

noWinNoFee.title: No Win, No Fee
noWinNoFee.text: Our service is completely free unless we successfully claim compensation for you. We charge a 30% commission only on the amount recovered.

q1.a: Only when we successfully recover compensation for you. If we don't win, you pay nothing.

q2.a: Our commission covers all legal work, airline negotiations, correspondence, and claim processing.

q3.a: Absolutely not. The 30% commission is the only fee. No signup fees, no processing fees, no cancellation fees.

q4.q: What if my claim is unsuccessful?
q4.a: You pay nothing. We absorb all costs and risks associated with pursuing your claim.

cta.title: Ready to claim?
cta.text: Check your eligibility for free — no obligation.

hero.title: Careers at Jet2Pay
hero.subtitle: Help us fight for passenger rights across Europe. Join a fast-growing team making a real difference.

culture.title: Why Work With Us
culture.text1: At Jet2Pay, we're building something meaningful — a platform that helps everyday travelers get the compensation they deserve.
culture.text2: We value transparency, innovation, and a strong sense of justice. Our team works remotely across Europe, united by a shared mission.
culture.cardText: Flexible work, competitive pay, and the satisfaction of helping thousands of passengers every month.

claimsSpecialist.title: Claims Specialist
claimsSpecialist.desc: Process and manage flight compensation claims. Communicate with airlines and keep passengers informed about their claim status.

legalAdvisor.title: Legal Advisor
legalAdvisor.desc: Provide legal expertise on EC261/UK261 regulations. Review complex cases and prepare legal documentation for airline negotiations.

frontendDev.title: Frontend Developer
frontendDev.desc: Build and maintain our React-based web platform. Work on improving the claims submission experience and admin dashboard.

customerSupport.title: Customer Support
customerSupport.desc: Help passengers with questions about their claims. Provide excellent customer service across email and chat channels.

cta.title: Don't see a perfect fit?

q1.q: How long does a claim take?
q1.a: Most claims are resolved within 6-12 weeks, depending on the airline's response time.

q2.a: Your boarding pass, booking confirmation, and a valid ID. We'll guide you through the process.

q3.q: Can I claim for a flight from years ago?
q3.a: Yes! In most EU countries, you can claim for flights up to 3 years old. In some countries, the limit extends to 6 years.
